description.ko: 좌측 사이드바 폴더 탐색기 — 여러 폴더를 등록하고(각 이름 변경) 선택한 폴더의 파일/폴더를 보여준다. 파일 열기는 코어 editor.open 으로 위임.
description.en: Left sidebar folder explorer — register multiple folders (each renamable) and browse the selected folder's files/folders. Opening a file is delegated to the core editor.open command.

nodes.description: Registered-folder chip; click selects it as the active folder. data-node="chip/<pathKey>".
Per-chip remove button; opens the remove-confirm modal. data-node="chip-remove/<pathKey>".
Inline rename input for a chip, shown after a double-click. data-node="rename/<pathKey>".
Add-folder button; opens the folder-picker modal.
Add-folder modal backdrop; click closes it.
Folder-picker tree container inside the add-folder modal.
Error line inside the add-folder modal.
Confirm button that registers the picked folder.
Remove-confirm modal backdrop; click closes it.
Cancel button in the remove-confirm modal.
Confirm button that unregisters the folder from the list.
